_comment: D5 fixture for /demos/open-gen-ui and /demos/open-gen-ui-advanced. Multi-turn for the advanced flow; first turn covers basic open-shape, second covers an advanced multi-step flow. Substrings 'render an open gen-ui element' and 'continue the advanced gen-ui flow' are unique.

response.content: The open gen-UI element was rendered. The LLM produced an arbitrary-shape JSON payload and the renderer materialized it as a UI block.
The advanced gen-UI flow continued with the second-step component. The chained payloads from turns 1 and 2 form the complete advanced gen-UI sequence.
